prevalence.source: IADVL and occupational dermatology epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant work disruption and chronic dermatitis burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical dermatitis with exposure history; patch testing for allergic contact dermatitis

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on avoidance and workplace controls

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis common; patch testing limited to tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Avoidance, emollients, topical steroids; workplace protection and PPE
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited occupational health coverage and patch testing access
